data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of a 'Full ticket ownership timeline audit', but there is no evidence provided that confirms this functionality is implemented or working as intended. The linked use case specifies the need for a full audit, yet the prior steps do not include any evidence of an ownership timeline or audit process. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence regarding this specific functionality.
gaps: No evidence of full ticket ownership timeline audit.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the full ticket ownership timeline audit.
